name: Chicken Laredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry the chicken pieces and sprinkle with garlic powder.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the chicken and onions in butter until browned.
3. Reduce heat.
4. Sprinkle raisins, olives, and cinnamon over the chicken.
5. Pour the chicken stock over the chicken.
6. Cover and cook for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Serve with rice if desired.
This is the winner of a Chicken Reader Recipe Contest submitted by Linda Carter of Wortham, Ms. The recipe has been passed on to many friends who are surprised by its unique combination but enjoy it nonetheless.
